stories: Good morning Sean, it's Monday, the eleventh of May, 2026
Fun fact: twenty-nine years ago today, IBM's Deep Blue defeated chess world champion Garry Kasparov — the first computer ever to beat a reigning world champion in a full match
The Mount Dukono story has moved from a search to a recovery
Rescue teams have located the bodies of the two missing Singaporean hikers near the crater rim, but continuous eruptions, flooding, and rain have halted retrieval operations
Both are confirmed dead, alongside a local guide
The seven surviving Singaporeans are heading home — a tragic end to a group that entered a restricted zone to create social media content
On a brighter note, Singapore's CPF could soon become a major driver of local equities
A new proposal would redirect fund savings into the stock market, with Citi estimating annual inflows of six to nine billion dollars
Good evening Sean, it's Sunday evening, the tenth of May 2026
Hope you connected with family today â it was Mother's Day
Fun fact: scientists this week identified regeneration genes shared across axolotls, zebrafish, and mice that could one day help humans regrow lost limbs
At ten, your Weekly Planning and Look-Ahead with Bob and Rehan on WebEx
At eleven thirty, your Monthly one-on-one with Robyn
The Mount Dukono search has entered a grim phase â teams have narrowed focus to two volcanic sand mounds near the crater, the suspected sites of the two missing Singaporeans
A hundred and fifty personnel are pressing on despite continuous eruptions and rain
The seven other Singaporeans evacuated from the volcano were due home today
Good evening Sean, it's Sunday evening, the tenth of May 2026
Happy Mother's Day to the special people in your life
" distress call has nothing to do with the month of May
It comes from the French phrase m'aidez, meaning help me, coined by a radio operator at Croydon Airport in 1923
At ten in the morning, your Weekly Planning and Look-Ahead Session with Bob and Rehan on WebEx
Then at eleven thirty, your Monthly one-on-one with Robyn, also on WebEx
On Singapore, the search for two missing Singaporeans at Mount Dukono continued today without success
Around 150 rescue personnel with thermal drones are deployed near the crater rim, but continuing eruptions and heavy rain are hampering the operation
